ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar May-09-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Mar-14-2018 Continued To May-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Bridges Specially Appearing for James Millar on behalf of petitioner

The Court informed Counsel the Inventory and Appraisal has been filed, but the bond is insufficient, noted that Mr. Millar filed a declaration, and inquired about the filing on close of estate as ordered on February 14th. Mr. Bridges stated a bookkeeper has been hired to get the accounting done, that there are various properties/accounts, that there are many questions from the Probate Referee, will file 850 petition on the mother's interest of the estate, and an ex parte petition to increase bond will be filed forthwith. The status on close of estate is continued to May 9, 2018, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on increase of bond and a proper verified/noticed petition to approve a report on status of administration and request for continuance of administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Continued To Mar-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Millar for Kevin Simmonite (Administrator).

Mr. Millar stated that the inventory and appraisal was sent to the Probate Referee in late January, that there has been some back and forth, and that the assessments of value may take another 30-days. Mr. Millar also stated that there have been several sales of properties, that there is cash on hand in the amount of $8,500,000.00, that there are sixty beneficiaries plus or minus, that the multiple sales were not completed until August of last year, that the Administrator's Mother passed away and that it has been difficult. Status on close of estate is continued to March 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 by which time there needs to be both an inventory and appraisal, and either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
